title: Japan passes crypto overhaul to bring digital assets under financial rules
summary: Japan’s revised Financial Instruments and Exchange Act introduces crypto insider trading rules, tougher penalties and new oversight requirements for crypto businesses.

title: South Korea to bring digital assets under new state asset management system
summary: South Korea’s Economy Ministry plans to include digital assets and intellectual property under the country’s new state-asset management framework.

title: The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
Bitcoin’s real power is that anyone willing to pay fees can write to the ledger. BIP-110’s backers want to change that for data-heavy transactions. The backlash reveals what’s truly at stake.

title: Team Behind Ethereum's Institutional Privacy Push Spins Out For-Profit Firm EthSystems
summary: The startup's backers, including Bitmine and Joe Lubin, are betting institutions need a privacy layer before running money on a public chain.

title: US, UK Outline Recommendations to Align Stablecoin and Tokenization Rules
summary: The joint recommendations back cross-border stablecoins and tokenized markets, setting a shared direction while avoiding binding rules.

title: Czech Republic moves to block Polymarket over unlicensed gambling
summary: The Czech Republic moved to block Polymarket, joining other European jurisdictions targeting prediction markets over unlicensed gambling.

title: Japan passes key bill recognizing crypto as financial product, lowering tax rate
summary: The amendments establish the basis for separate crypto taxation at a rate of approximately 20%, down from the current maximum 55% rate.

title: China’s economy grows at one of lowest rates in decades
summary: Second-quarter GDP figure falls below annual target range as economic pressure mounts

title: The global minerals arms race
summary: Beijing’s export controls on rare earths and other niche metals are distorting markets and fuelling resource nationalism

title: BlackRock profits jump as assets under management hit a record $15 trillion
summary: Shares in the fund manager rise as company says its will boost quarterly buybacks to $550 million

title: This Wall Street ‘theme-o-meter’ has a clear message: The artificial-intelligence bull market is back.
summary: UBS says its top theme right now is that leadership for artificial-intelligence stocks is returning, and earnings season may prove how investors have been too pessimistic.
